objects.name: 20th April – Threat Intelligence Report
objects.description: For the latest discoveries in cyber research for the week of 20th April, please download our Threat Intelligence Bulletin. TOP ATTACKS AND BREACHES Booking.com, the Amsterdam-based travel platform, has confirmed a data breach after unauthorized parties accessed reservation data linked to some customers. Exposed information included names, email addresses, phone numbers, physical addresses, and booking […] The post 20th April – Threat Intelligence Report appeared first on Check Point Research .
